elements.title: lang::report_page_042_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id, kbi_c.fullname, l.learners, kbi_cc.completed, kbi_g.grade, kbi_lit.timespend AS timespend, kbi_lit.visits AS visits
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid, COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid) AS learners
                  FROM mdl_context kbi_ctx
                         JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id
                         JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.courseid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
                         JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id AND kbi_ue.userid = kbi_ra.userid
                  WHERE kbi_ctx.instanceid > 0
                    AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    AND kbi_ctx.instanceid = :courseid
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                    AND kbi_e.status = 0
                    AND kbi_ue.status = 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid) l ON l.instanceid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_gi.courseid,
                         ROUND(AVG(CASE
                                     WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                                     ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade
                  FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id
                  WHERE kbi_gi.courseid > 0
                    AND kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
                    AND kbi_gi.courseid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_gi.courseid) g ON kbi_g.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cc.course, COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cc.userid) AS completed
                  FROM mdl_course_completions kbi_cc
                  WHERE kbi_cc.course > 0
                    AND kbi_cc.timecompleted > 0
                    AND kbi_cc.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_cc.course) cc ON kbi_cc.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_lit.courseid, SUM(kbi_lil.timespend) AS timespend, SUM(kbi_lil.visits) AS visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit
                         JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_lil ON kbi_lil.trackid = kbi_lit.id
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_lit.courseid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                         JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id AND kbi_ra.userid = kbi_lit.userid
                  WHERE kbi_lit.courseid > 0
                    AND kbi_lit.courseid = :courseid
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                  GROUP BY kbi_lit.courseid) lit ON kbi_lit.courseid = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 1
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
